dbExport.title: Export yer charts
dbExport.desc: Backup yer current charts to a file ye can hide elsewhere

dbImportDesc: Avast! This will sink any existin' charts!

dbImportOld.title: Bring charts from an old version o' Ampersand
dbImportOld.desc: For backup files made with Ampersand < 0.2.0
dbImportOld.note: Old versions used a format (ampdb) that be outdated. If ye have old backups, bring 'em aboard now and re-export 'em, or they'll be lost to the depths soon.

pkImport: Bring charts from a PluralKit export
ocImport: Bring charts from an Octocon export
tuImport: Bring charts from a Tupperbox export
spImport: Bring charts from a Simply Plural export

status.imported: The backup be aboard. Restart the ship!
status.importedSp: The Simply Plural charts be aboard. Restart the ship!
status.importedOc: The Octocon charts be aboard. Restart the ship!
status.importedPk: The PluralKit charts be aboard. Restart the ship!
status.importedTu: The Tupperbox charts be aboard. Restart the ship!
status.exportedApp: The backup has been sent to the cove ye chose.
status.exportedAppIos: The backup has been sent to the Ampersand folder in the Files app.
status.errorExport: Error while sendin' the backup away.
status.error: Error while bringin' the backup aboard.
status.errorOc: Error while bringin' the Octocon charts aboard.
status.errorSp: Error while bringin' the Simply Plural charts aboard.
status.errorPk: Error while bringin' the PluralKit charts aboard.
status.errorTu: Error while bringin' the Tupperbox charts aboard.
